stemHtml:
A weather briefing for a short flight from Paris Orly (LFPO) to Brussels (EBBR) on the 21st November includes the following warning message:

EBBR AD WRNG 3 VALID 211100/211700 WIND 50KT MAX 65KT OBS WKN=

The flight is due to land in Brussels at 16:30 UTC. Which of the following options best describes the conditions forecast in the message?

options.a: Strong winds on approach but weakening closer to the ground, to a maximum of 65 kt.
options.b: Strong surface winds, but NOT as strong as earlier in the warning period.
options.c: Strong surface winds, stronger than those earlier in the warning period.
options.d: Strong surface winds of at least 65 kt.
